topic: Certification, patent, and policy funding preparation sequence
primaryAudience: Korean founders and SMEs deciding whether to prepare certification, patent, R&D center evidence, or policy funding first
corePromise: Help founders decide which proof to prepare first so certification, patent, and funding work support each other instead of moving separately.
corePromiseKo: 기업인증, 특허, 정책자금 준비가 따로 움직이지 않도록 무엇을 먼저 준비해야 할지 판단합니다.
primaryCta: Open the Grant Labs consultation checklist and request a 15-minute diagnostic call.
primaryCtaKo: Grant Labs 상담 준비 체크리스트를 열고 15분 진단 상담을 요청하세요.
pillarPoints: Certification is stronger when it is backed by real operating records, not just an application form.
Patent preparation should connect to the company's product, research activity, and commercialization plan.
Policy funding readiness improves when certification, patent, and financial evidence are sequenced before the announcement rush.
A short diagnostic can prevent wasted work by deciding whether certification, patent, R&D center, or funding should come first.
pillarPointsKo: 기업인증은 신청서보다 실제 운영 기록과 증빙이 함께 준비될 때 설득력이 높아집니다.
특허 준비는 제품, 연구 활동, 사업화 계획과 연결되어야 이후 활용도가 높아집니다.
정책자금 준비도는 공고가 뜬 뒤가 아니라 인증, 특허, 재무 증빙 순서가 먼저 잡힐 때 올라갑니다.
짧은 진단만으로도 기업인증, 특허, 연구소, 정책자금 중 무엇을 먼저 할지 정리할 수 있습니다.
complianceNotes: Do not guarantee certification, patent registration, or funding approval.
Avoid implying government affiliation or official agency status.
Use readiness, sequence, and diagnostic language instead of guaranteed-result language.
Do not advise filing patent or certification work without reviewing actual business evidence.
